zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Edward de Guildford於1385年出生在英國肯特洛爾文登時，他的父親William Guildford26歲，母親Joan de Haldan40歲。他於大約1410年與Julian Pitlesden在英國肯特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1419年在英國肯特被列為member of parliament for kent county。他去世於1449年在他的家鄉享年64歲，埋葬在英國肯特洛爾文登。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Edward de Guildford于1385年出生在英国肯特洛爾文登时，他的父亲William Guildford26岁，母亲Joan de Haldan40岁。他于大约1410年与Julian Pitlesden在英国肯特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1419年在英国肯特被列为member of parliament for kent county。他去世于1449年在他的家乡享年64岁，埋葬在英国肯特洛爾文登。

nameMeanings.name: Guildford
meanings: Gild-ford, from gild, a guild, society, or club where money was paid for support, and ford, a ford, meaning a stock ford

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Edward de Guildford was born in 1385, in Rolvenden, Kent, England, his father, William Guildford, was 26 and his mother, Joan de Haldan, was 40. He married Julian Pitlesden about 1410, in Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. In 1419, at the age of 34, his occupation is listed as member of parliament for kent county in Kent, England. He died in 1449, in his hometown, at the age of 64, and was buried in Rolvenden, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Edward de Guildford est né en 1385, à Rolvenden, Kent, Angleterre, son père, William Guildford, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Joan de Haldan, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Julian Pitlesden environ 1410, à Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. En 1419, à l’âge de 34 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est member of parliament for kent county à Kent, Angleterre. Il est décédé en 1449, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Rolvenden, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Edward de Guildford 1385 in Rolvenden, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Guildford 26 und seine Mutter Joan de Haldan 40. Er hat um 1410 in Kent, England Julian Pitlesden geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. 1419, als er 34 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als member of parliament for kent county in Kent, England aufgeführt. Er starb 1449 im Alter von 64 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Rolvenden, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edward de Guildford è nato il nel 1385 nel Rolvenden, Kent, England, il suo padre, William Guildford, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Haldan, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Julian Pitlesden circa 1410, nel Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Nel 1419, all'età di 34 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come member of parliament for kent county nel Kent, England. Morì nel 1449, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Rolvenden, Kent, England.

ja.Halden Manor, Rolvenden, Kent, England: イギリスケントロルベンデン
ja.Rolvenden, Kent, England: イギリスケントロルベンデン
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Edward de Guildfordが1385年にイギリスケントロルベンデンで生まれた時，父William Guildfordは26歳，母Joan de Haldanは40歳であった。約1410年にイギリスケントでJulian Pitlesdenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。1419年，34歳の時，イギリスケントでの職業はmember of parliament for kent countyと記録されている。彼は1449年に故郷で64歳で死去し，イギリスケントロルベンデンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Edward de Guildford(이)가 1385년 영국 켄트 롤븐든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Guildford(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Haldan(은)는 40세였다. 그는 대략 1410년 영국 켄트에서 Julian Pitlesden(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1419년, 34세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 켄트에서 member of parliament for kent county이었다. 그는 1449년 그의 고향에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 롤븐든에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edward de Guildford nasceu em 1385, em Rolvenden, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Guildford, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Haldan, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Julian Pitlesden aproximadamente 1410, em Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Em 1419, com 34 anos, sua profissão aparece como member of parliament for kent county em Kent, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 1449, em sua cidade natal, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Rolvenden, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Edward de Guildford родился в 1385 г. в местности ролвенден, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени William Guildford было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Haldan, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Julian Pitlesden около 1410 г. в местности кэнт, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. В 1419 году, в возрасте 34 лет,  он работал по профессии member of parliament for kent county в местности кэнт, Англия. Он умер в 1449 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности ролвенден, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Edward de Guildford nació en 1385, en Rolvenden, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, William Guildford, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Joan de Haldan, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Julian Pitlesden aproximadamente 1410, en Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. En 1419, a la edad de 34 años, su ocupación registrada era member of parliament for kent county en Kent, Inglaterra. Murió en 1449, en su pueblo, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Rolvenden, Kent, Inglaterra.
